declarations.default: 'In the depths of the ocean, scientists discovered an ancient ecosystem thriving around hydrothermal vents. These towering underwater chimneys spew hot, mineral-rich water, supporting unique life forms—giant tube worms, ghostly shrimp, and bacteria that convert chemicals into energy. This alien-like world, hidden beneath miles of water, may hold secrets to understanding life beyond Earth.'
